subcodes.first_line: O seeker of the path of God! A multitude, both night and day, pursued their own fancies in their spiritual quest, yet reaped naught but doubts [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای سالک راه خدا جمعی شب و روز بخیال خویش سلوک نمودند و بجز شکوک ثمری ندیدند و
subcodes.subjects: @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @empty learning; false spirituality, @permission for visit; pilgrimage, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
